message:
feat(freeze): Convert property access and iterator ops to Zig

Property access operations:
- get_field: Pop object, get property by name string, push result
  * Zig: Uses qjs.JS_GetPropertyStr with @intCast for stack access
  * Handles empty/invalid atom indices with JS_UNDEFINED fallback

- get_field2: Peek object (TOP), get property, push (for method calls)
  * Keeps object on stack for subsequent method invocation
  * Zig: stack[@intCast(sp - 1)] instead of TOP() macro

- put_field: Pop value and object, set property by name
  * Zig: Returns c_int from JS_SetPropertyStr, check < 0
  * Uses qjs.JS_EXCEPTION instead of JS_EXCEPTION macro

Iterator operations (for-in, for-of loops):
- for_in_start, for_in_next: Object property enumeration
- for_of_start, for_of_next: Iterable protocol (arrays, etc)
  * All call QuickJS wrapper functions (js_frozen_for_*)
  * Zig: Compare != 0 instead of truthy check
  * Zig: @intCast for stack pointer arithmetic
  * Stack pointer increments (sp += 2) work identically

All operations maintain proper stack discipline and error handling.
C output unchanged (backward compatible).
